functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Hammerhead Guide
pages:
Hammerhead Guide

A Choascraft guide for hammerhead shark facts, taming, riding, drops, and gear.

Fact 1

Hammerhead sharks are named for their wide hammer-shaped heads.

Fact 2

The wide head helps spread their senses across a larger area while searching for prey.

Fact 3

Hammerheads use electroreception to sense hidden animals, including prey buried in sand.

Fact 4

Their eyes sit near the ends of the head, giving them a broad view of the water around them.

Fact 5

Some hammerheads travel in schools, especially around warm coastal waters and seamounts.

Fact 6

Hammerheads eat fish, squid, crustaceans, and rays depending on the species and habitat.

Fact 7

The head shape can help them turn sharply and pin prey against the sea floor.

Fact 8

Like other sharks, hammerheads have cartilage skeletons and replace teeth through life.

Choascraft Hammerheads

Hammerhead sharks spawn in small groups in oceans that are not frozen or cold.

Wild Hunters

A rare wild hammerhead can spawn as a player hunter. It will not hunt players while a player is riding it.

Taming

Hammerhead sharks can be tamed with cod, salmon, or tropical fish.

Riding

Tamed hammerheads can be saddled and ridden. Saddled sharks give water breathing while mounted.

Storage

Tamed hammerheads can accept chests, giving them storage for long ocean trips.

Breeding

Tamed hammerheads breed with salmon. Baby sharks grow over time and follow nearby parents.

Drops

Hammerheads use shark drops: Shark Meat, Shark Tooth, Shark Fin, Shark Hide, and the rare Shark Eye.

Cooking

Shark Meat can be cooked in a furnace, smoker, or campfire to make Cooked Shark Meat.

Crafting Key

I = Iron Ingot
T = Shark Tooth
F = Shark Fin
H = Shark Hide
E = Shark Eye
. = empty slot

Shark Sword

.T.
FIH
.E.

IFI

Netherite Shark Gear

Use a smithing table with a netherite upgrade template, shark gear, and a netherite ingot.

Captain Note

A hammerhead reads the water with its whole head. If one turns toward you, pay attention.
